title: KAZAKHSTAN / EGYENSÚLYBAN – BABUSHKA MASHA (Hungarian Edition)
description:
The true cost of life never shows up in a balance sheet.

Babushka Masha: «I had no choice»

«Babushka Masha» is about simple and hard facts of life being exposed as much as Babushka Masha dares to open up.
This documentary is not about politics - no poor female soul is glorified, no painting rosy a horrible past or turning a horrific life into a happy end.

It is a drama of emotional life, a process starting somewhere and ending someplace,
somehow,...when we decide to stop asking questions.

There is a kind of secret in all this I did not mention yet: Integrity. Though life looks like
a washing machine in reverse - the laundry getting more dirty the longer the washing is on -
where people end upside down in the process, their soul in hell, their values corrupted.
But when the door of the «life-washer» finally opens and confusion as well as destruction
look unbearable, there seems to be some sort of integrity surviving in all this that takes my breath.

Jürg Da Vaz

Filmed on location in Kostanay, Kazakhstan, May 2003

A handmade Da Vaz production 2003

DaVaz productions
